description: Calibre ebook library server: search, read content, curate metadata, semantic search, gated writes.
name: io.github.caelum29/calibre-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Calibre Content Server base URL (default http://localhost:8080)
environmentVariables.name: CALIBRE_MCP_SERVER_URL

environmentVariables.description: Library name; empty = auto-detect the server's default library
environmentVariables.name: CALIBRE_MCP_LIBRARY

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to enable the write tools (update/bulk-update/add/remove); off by default
environmentVariables.name: CALIBRE_MCP_ENABLE_WRITE

environmentVariables.description: Path to the calibredb binary; empty = auto-discover the standard install location
environmentVariables.name: CALIBRE_MCP_CALIBREDB_PATH
